series_title: น้องมะลิจอมพลังแห่งความดี
episode_title: มะลิและภารกิจเก็บตุ๊กตา
character_outfit: ชุดนอนลายการ์ตูนน่ารัก (cute cartoon patterned pajamas)

storyboard.image_prompt: Mali, 3 years old, two pigtail buns, pink flower clip. Wearing cute cartoon patterned pajamas. Sitting on messy wooden floor, surrounded by many scattered stuffed animals and toys. A TV is on in the background. Cinematic lighting, soft glow. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Mali is sitting on the floor, surrounded by a mess of toys. She's looking around idly, maybe playing with one small toy. The camera is steady. (Mali: "ทำไมตุ๊กตาเต็มไปหมดเลยนะ?")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: (พูดกับตัวเอง) "ทำไมตุ๊กตาเต็มไปหมดเลยนะ?"

storyboard.image_prompt: Mali (fixed identity) looking confused, wearing cartoon patterned pajamas. A tall shadow (Mom's) is approaching. Empty colorful toy basket visible nearby. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Mom (only her legs and shadow visible) enters the frame, carrying an empty colorful toy basket. She stops next to Mali. (Mom: "มะลิคะ วันนี้เราต้องช่วยกันเก็บของเล่นให้หมดนะ")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: แม่: (นอกเฟรม) "มะลิคะ วันนี้เราต้องช่วยกันเก็บของเล่นให้หมดนะ"

storyboard.image_prompt: Close-up on Mali's face (fixed identity), looking up with large innocent eyes. Wearing cartoon patterned pajamas. She smiles slightly. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Mali looks up at her mother, smiling broadly with her hands on her hips in determination. (Mali: "โอเคค่ะแม่ มะลิจะเป็นฮีโร่เก็บตุ๊กตา!")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: (ยิ้มกว้าง) "โอเคค่ะแม่ มะลิจะเป็นฮีโร่เก็บตุ๊กตา!"

storyboard.image_prompt: Mali (fixed identity) stands in the center of the messy room, wearing cartoon patterned pajamas. The toy basket is behind her. She takes a deep, determined breath. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Mali is standing amidst the scattered toys. She takes a deep breath, puffs out her cheeks, and looks around, ready to begin. (Mali: "อึ๊บ! เริ่มภารกิจ!")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: (หายใจเข้าลึกๆ) "อึ๊บ! เริ่มภารกิจ!"

storyboard.image_prompt: Mali (fixed identity) kneeling on the floor, wearing cartoon patterned pajamas. She picks up a small stuffed elephant and places it carefully into the toy basket, which already has a few toys. Bright, warm lighting. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Mali crawls slightly, picking up several small stuffed animals one by one, tossing them into the basket quickly. (Mali: "นี่แน่ะ! หนึ่ง สอง สาม สี่...")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: (เก็บตุ๊กตาอย่างรวดเร็ว) "นี่แน่ะ! หนึ่ง สอง สาม สี่..."

storyboard.image_prompt: Close-up on Mali (fixed identity) with intense focus, wearing cartoon patterned pajamas. She is struggling to lift a much larger stuffed lion that is almost her size. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Mali tries to lift a large stuffed lion, pulling it with both hands. It's heavy, and she loses her balance, almost falling back, but manages to keep the lion in her arms. (Mali: "ฮึบ! ช้างตัวใหญ่อ่ะ!")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: (พยายามยกตุ๊กตาตัวใหญ่) "ฮึบ! ช้างตัวใหญ่อ่ะ!"

storyboard.image_prompt: Wide shot of the messy room, slowly getting tidier on one side. Mali (fixed identity), wearing cartoon patterned pajamas, is now pushing the large stuffed lion across the floor toward the basket. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Mali uses all her force to push the big lion with her body, sliding it across the wooden floor towards the basket. (Mali: "อึดๆ... อีกนิดเดียว...")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: (ดันตุ๊กตา) "อึดๆ... อีกนิดเดียว..."

storyboard.image_prompt: Low-angle shot, Mali (fixed identity), wearing cartoon patterned pajamas, on her hands and knees, reaching far under a wooden bookshelf. She has a curious expression. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Mali sees her favorite blue rabbit doll tucked far under the bookshelf. She crawls flat and reaches in with her little arm. (Mali: "อ๊ะ! น้องกระต่ายไปอยู่ตรงนั้นเอง!")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: (สังเกตเห็นตุ๊กตาตัวโปรด) "อ๊ะ! น้องกระต่ายไปอยู่ตรงนั้นเอง!"

storyboard.image_prompt: Mali (fixed identity) holding the blue rabbit doll close to her cheek, wearing cartoon patterned pajamas. She is walking to the main basket, which is now almost full. The rest of the room is noticeably clearer. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Mali pulls the rabbit out, hugs it, kisses its head, and then proudly places it on top of the pile in the basket. (Mali: "กลับบ้านกันนะน้องรัก...")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: (กอดและจูบตุ๊กตา) "กลับบ้านกันนะน้องรัก..."

storyboard.image_prompt: The bedroom is now clean and neat. Mali (fixed identity), wearing cartoon patterned pajamas, jumps into her mother's arms. The full toy basket is in the corner. Warm, happy cinematic lighting. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Mom (visible now) kneels and opens her arms. Mali runs and jumps into a tight embrace, both smiling happily. (Mali: "เย้! มะลิทำความดีสำเร็จแล้ว!")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: มะลิ: (กอดแม่) "เย้! มะลิทำความดีสำเร็จแล้ว!"
